metadata.title: Germany Contractor Management Services | Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Germany contractor management and compliant contractor onboarding. Engage freelancers in Germany without entity. German contractor classification, social security, contracts. Fast onboarding.

faqs.title: Germany Contractor FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about contractor management in Germany.

items.question: What is the risk of misclassifying contractors in Germany?
items.answer: German authorities can reclassify contractors as employees (Scheinselbstständigkeit - false self-employment), leading to back social security contributions, taxes, and penalties. Using compliant contracts and proper classification assessment reduces this risk.

items.question: How fast can I onboard a contractor in Germany?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank, contractor onboarding typically takes 2–5 business days once you provide engagement details. We handle contracts, tax forms, and compliance checks for Germany.

items.question: Can I convert a contractor to an employee later?
items.answer: Yes. If a contractor role becomes permanent, we can convert them to a full employee via our Germany EOR service, with compliant German employment contracts and benefits (social security, health insurance, pension, unemployment insurance).

items.question: Do you handle contractor payments and invoicing in Germany?
items.answer: Yes. Our platform supports contractor invoicing and payments in EUR, with proper documentation for German tax and social security compliance.

items.question: What is Scheinselbstständigkeit?
items.answer: Scheinselbstständigkeit (false self-employment) occurs when a contractor is actually an employee. German authorities check factors like economic dependence, integration into the company, and lack of entrepreneurial risk. We help you assess and avoid this classification risk.
